description_long: This object is a standalone basketball hoop structure commonly found in urban recreational areas. It features a sturdy, rectangular metal pole anchored to a wide base plate for stability, supporting a transparent rectangular glass backboard. The backboard is framed with a dark border and is attached to a standard metal basketball rim, which is painted red and includes a hoop but no net. The support arm is reinforced with diagonal bracing for added strength, ensuring the hoop can withstand repeated impacts from basketball play. The materials and construction suggest it is designed for outdoor use, resistant to weather and heavy use. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, typical of modern urban basketball installations.
description: A robust outdoor basketball hoop with a rectangular glass backboard, metal support pole, and red rim, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled support arm, rectangular glass backboard, and red hoop extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the transparent rectangular backboard, centered red rim, and sturdy base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the angled support arm and hoop, with clear visibility of the mounting structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the support pole and the full width of the backboard.
